title: Spartan Weaponry Addon Toolkit
description: Developer tools for easier creation of Spartan Weaponry addons.
body:
**
Spartan Weaponry Addon Toolkit is a library that makes creating [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) addons a breeze.
** ![Logo banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e635bf06a942326908c05bf879e993e7e6658b4.png) **Spartan Weaponry Addon Toolkit** allows for automatic registering of entire weapon sets just by specifying the materials. This toolkit also handles data generation, including tags, item models, and recipes. Additionally, it resolves several issues present in the Spartan Weaponry API. If you are interested in using this library for your mod, check out the [GitHub page](https://github.com/KreloX/SpartanToolkit) (WIP). **Used in:** - [Spartan Weaponry: Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-ice-and-fire) - [Spartan Weaponry: Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-aether) - [Spartan Weaponry: Twilight Forest](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-twilight-forest) - [Spartan Weaponry: Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-undergarden) - [Spartan Weaponry: Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-blue-skies) - [Spartan Weaponry: SimpleOres](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-simpleores) - [Spartan Weaponry: Gobber](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-gobber)
